rect.style: animation:scan 2s ease-in-out infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(74, 144, 217);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:4px, 3px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.27272;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

path.style: animation:flowR 1.5s linear infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(216, 90, 48);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:5px, 4px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:flowR 1.8s linear infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(216, 90, 48);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:5px, 4px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

line.style: animation:flowU 1.2s linear infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(156, 154, 146);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
